partners.description: A leading European technical university with world-class research in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and robotics. The Chair of AI Foundations has pioneered work in neuro-symbolic AI, automated planning, and LLM-based reasoning systems.

partners.legal_name: Centre Européen de Recherche en Informatique Avancée
partners.description: A French national research institute for digital science and technology. The CERIA multi-agent systems team has extensive expertise in formal coordination protocols, distributed AI, and game-theoretic approaches to multi-agent cooperation.

A Dutch research university hosting leading research groups in deep learning, information retrieval, and memory-augmented neural networks. Pioneers in retrieval-augmented generation and neural memory architectures.

A major Italian technical university with a leading Department of Mechanical Engineering and a dedicated AI for Manufacturing lab. Extensive experience in digital twins, smart factory systems, and AI-driven process optimisation in operational industrial settings.

A leading Scandinavian medical university. The Centre for Health Informatics conducts research on AI-assisted clinical decision support, medical knowledge representation, and clinical NLP. Access to de-identified clinical datasets and established clinical validation pathways.

A major European logistics company operating in over 80 countries. The ELI Innovation Lab develops AI-powered logistics optimisation, predictive supply chain management, and autonomous planning systems. Provides real-world logistics operations data and deployment environments.

A leading European private AI lab, specialising in building custom large language models and integrating LLM capabilities into enterprise applications. Developer of open-source European LLMs. Expertise in LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and production-grade AI deployment.

A major Spanish applied research and technology centre. The AI and Data Analytics division leads work on AI evaluation frameworks, benchmarking methodologies, and technology transfer through European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs). Experienced in managing EDIH networks and AI-on-demand platform contributions.
